title: Avoid Catching NullPointerException
description: NullPointerException should be avoided, not caught. Any situation in which NullPointerException is explicitly caught can easily be converted to a null test, and any behavior being carried out in the catch block can easily be moved to the "is null" branch of the conditional.
recommendation: Replace catch block with null test
impact: Improves code quality by avoiding unnecessary exception handling

checks.message: Replace catch block with null test
